message:
style(storage): apply rustfmt to document.rs and pipeline.rs

Reformat code in the storage crate to satisfy rustfmt:

- document.rs: Collapse the mark_skipped function signature from
  multi-line to single-line since all parameters fit within the line
  limit. Remove trailing whitespace on a blank line in
  upsert_document_with_outcome.

- pipeline.rs: Reflow two long mark_skipped call chains in
  StorageBackedJobRunner (for "empty content preview" and "hash
  embeddings computed on-the-fly" skip paths) to wrap the if-let
  error binding across multiple lines, keeping each chained method
  call clearly visible.

No behavioral changes -- formatting only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
